title.description: The title at the top of the page

description.message: Kuwasha kiendelezi hiki kutaelekeza maswali unayoandika kwenye upau wa utafutaji wa Safari kwa ChatGPT Search, na kufanya ChatGPT Search kuwa injini yako ya utafutaji chaguo-msingi katika Safari. Sera zile zile zinazodhibiti matumizi yako ya ChatGPT zinatumika.
description.description: The message shown on the extension's popup

learn_more.description: The text for the learn more link

extension_description.message: Tumia utafutaji wa ChatGPT moja kwa moja kutoka kwenye upau wa zana wa Safari.
extension_description.description: The description of what the extension does
